text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As class representative, I hope to Bakushin my
way through my races!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Then, I'll become a role model for everyone by
dominating all the G1 races! WOW, what an
exemplary idea! My intelligence scares even me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
